title: JAOPCASingularities
description: Just A Ore Processing Compatibility Attempt: Singularities
body:
This is an addon to JAOPCA and Avaritia, and aims to help add singularities for more materials to Avaritia.

Inspired by AOBD Singularities by RCXCrafter.

Note that the singularity module is passive, and materials need to be specified in the module config.
